mapper.insert: INSERT INTO device ( device_no, device_type, manufacturer, model, firmware_version, status, sim_card_no, remark, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{deviceNo}, #{deviceType}, #{manufacturer}, #{model}, #{firmwareVersion}, 'OFFLINE', #{simCardNo}, #{remark}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE device SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE device SET status = 'ONLINE', last_longitude = #{longitude}, last_latitude = #{latitude}, last_online_time = NOW(), last_heartbeat_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE device SET status = 'OFFLINE', update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE device SET last_heartbeat_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE device SET status = 'FAULT', remark = #{remark}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE device SET vehicle_id = #{vehicleId}, vehicle_plate = #{vehiclePlate}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{deviceId}
UPDATE device SET vehicle_id = NULL, vehicle_plate = NULL, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{deviceId}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM device
AND status = #{status}
SELECT * FROM device WHERE status = 'OFFLINE' AND last_heartbeat_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE)
